HTML templates for JavaScript examples and Flask application initialization with routes for templates and POST requests.

## Folders
- **[templates](templates/README.md)**: HTML templates for JavaScript examples using navigation, Fetch API, jQuery, and XMLHttpRequest.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initializes a Flask application and imports views from the js_example module.
- **[views.py](views.py.md)**: Defines routes for rendering JavaScript templates and adding two numbers via a POST request.
